name: Hot Milk Sponge Cake (Jvb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the cake flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Beat the eggs and vanilla in a separate bowl until combined.
3. Gradually add the sugar to the egg mixture while continuing to beat until the mixture becomes light and lemon-colored.
4. Blend the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture with a spatula or whisk.
5. Bring the milk and butter to a boil.
6. Quickly stir the boiling milk-butter mixture into the batter, ensuring it is well combined.
7. Pour the batter quickly into a greased and floured 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan (on the bottom only).
8. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
